title: Binding
description: A directed data-movement contract realized by a Provider. spec.mode names the movement mechanism; each mode admits a set of endpoint Kind pairings (cdc: Sourceâ†’EventStream; sink: EventStreamâ†’Dataset or EventStreamâ†’Source; ingest: Datasetâ†’EventStream), with the matching provider capability checked at validate time. Direction lives in sourceRef/targetRef â€” asset kinds are role-neutral.

mode.description: Movement mechanism: cdc (log-based capture out of a database), sink (continuous delivery from a stream into a durable target â€” object store or database), ingest (continuous pickup from an object store into a stream). batch is schema-reserved and rejected by validation in v1.

providerRef.description: Must implement the capability interface matching spec.mode (CDCCapableProvider / SinkCapableProvider).

options.description: Mode/provider-specific options (e.g. cdc: tables, snapshotMode, databaseHostname/databasePort for external sources).
